launch_method: Kasa smart-plug power cycle after the ROM had already been queued on SC64
result: visible but severely corrupted video through 60 seconds on real N64 after Kasa power cycle; TND logo/rating/license/intro model were visible, but the output had persistent lower-screen horizontal banding and bad vertical placement

post_test_state.action: sc64deployer reset, then Kasa smart-plug power cycle

conclusion: The H width/vsync pair is hardware-visible and does not black-screen by itself, but it is not a valid 480i fix. Test H scale-only next, then compare combinations only after scale has a hardware result.
